message:
fix(a11y,bugs): animation accessibility and runtime bug fixes

Accessibility fixes:
- TextReveal: implement prefers-reduced-motion support (was documented but not implemented)
- CharacterReveal: implement prefers-reduced-motion support
- MagneticButton: add reduced motion support, disable magnetic/shimmer effects
- ReviewForm: add autocomplete="name" to display name input
- ShareDialog: add autocomplete="new-password" to password input

Runtime bug fixes:
- trending.ts, recommendations.ts, RelatedPrompts: prevent NaN propagation in Math.max
  by filtering undefined/invalid values before calculation
- use-reviews.ts: add AbortController to prevent memory leaks on component unmount
- clipboard.ts: ensure textarea cleanup in finally block if error occurs during copy
- enhanced-timeline.tsx: add fallback for split().pop() returning undefined
- RatingFilter: validate number conversion to prevent NaN from invalid input

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
